subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that He hath come through the Manifestation of His Self, the Dawning-Place of His signs and the Source of His utterance, Who speaketh with truth and calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه اتی بمظهر نفسه و مشرق آیاته و مطلع بیانه الذی ینطق بالحق و یدع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
